metadata.title: Miro Mariapori - Full-stack Software Developer
metadata.description: Full-stack software developer building web applications, backends, APIs, integrations, and automation. Explore my experience, projects, and CV.

structuredData.description: Full-stack software developer building web applications, backends, APIs, integrations, and automation.

hero.name: Miro Mariapori
intro: I am a full-stack software developer looking for my next role in modern web development. My strongest tools are TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, and practical web, backend, and automation solutions.

In recent projects, I have built healthcare web applications, GraphQL backends, client-specific automations, real-time WebSocket solutions, and a full-stack platform for improving research project discoverability.

whatIDo.title: What I do
description: I build user interfaces, backends, APIs, and integrations that solve real needs. My main focus is modern full-stack web development: React and Next.js interfaces, Node.js services, GraphQL/REST APIs, and database-driven applications.

I can take responsibility from initial requirements to deployment: understand the user need, break the problem into shippable pieces, and keep the implementation maintainable beyond the first version.

howIWork.title: How I work
description: I work in a structured and practical way. I value clear code, readable architecture, useful documentation, and solutions that work well from the user's perspective.

I use AI tools to support ideation, implementation, code review, and repetitive work, while keeping the technical understanding in my own hands. I want to know what I am building, why it works, and how to fix it when it does not.
I am used to moving tasks forward independently, but I do my best work in teams where knowledge is shared openly, feedback is quick, and solutions improve through collaboration.

experience.title: Experience
description: At Helsinki XR Center, I worked in a full-stack role on a healthcare software platform. The work included React user interfaces, a GraphQL backend, integrations, motion-data processing, and handling sensitive user data responsibly.

As a freelance developer, I have delivered automations, websites, WordPress plugins, and custom software solutions for client needs. These projects have strengthened my ability to listen to customers, identify the essential problem, and ship working solutions independently.

education.title: Education
description: Bachelor of Engineering, Information and Communications Technology
Major: Software Engineering
Metropolia University of Applied Sciences
Estimated graduation: summer 2026

AboutPage.title: About me
AboutPage.description: I am a full-stack developer who builds practical web applications, backends, APIs, integrations, and automation. I care about understanding the user need, writing maintainable code, and taking solutions all the way to production.

general.name: Miro Mariapori
general.title: Full-stack Software Developer | React, Next.js & Node.js
general.summary: Full-stack developer with a strong focus on practical web development. I have built React and Next.js user interfaces, Node.js services, GraphQL and REST APIs, database-driven applications, and automation in internship and freelance projects. I understand systems quickly, move work forward independently, and write code that is easy to continue building on. I am looking for my next full-stack developer role where I can help build reliable web products for real user needs.

core: Full-stack web applications with TypeScript, React, and Next.js
Backend services, GraphQL/REST APIs, and integrations
Database-driven applications with PostgreSQL and MongoDB
Automation and data processing with Python and Node.js
Independent ownership from customer need to deployment

description: Developed a healthcare software platform in a full-stack role for designing, delivering, and analyzing physiotherapy exercises
Built and maintained a GraphQL backend connecting web applications with backend services
Implemented React-based user interfaces for exercise management, planning, and user feedback
Designed motion-data processing features for exercise analysis and user feedback
Implemented a neural-network-based motion analysis solution trained on 1000+ physiotherapy exercises
Contributed to browser-based visualizations as part of the broader application
Handled authentication, data protection, and sensitive user data considerations in the implementation
Deliver customer-specific software solutions, automations, websites, and plugins based on client needs
Define the customer's problem, scope the implementation, and take projects independently into use
Developed a Python-based Telegram bot for automated data collection and data processing
Built and maintained WordPress-based solutions, including custom plugins and platform-specific integrations
Evaluated the relevance and quality of online advertisements against user searches in an international quality-assurance environment, strengthening accuracy in data-driven evaluation work
Worked in time-critical air freight operations where precision, process discipline, and responsibility for smooth logistics were essential
Programmed coordinate measuring machines, performed product measurements, and assisted with customer communication and sales-related tasks

projects.name: Route Management System for an Autonomous Tracked Articulated Vehicle (thesis)
description: Designed and implemented a full-stack software layer for autonomous vehicle route management as part of Metropolia's KOTKA project in cooperation with the Finnish National Defence University
Built a React and Leaflet-based map interface for defining, storing, and monitoring vehicle-specific route plans
Implemented a TypeScript Node.js WebSocket server that routes commands to the correct vehicle identifier, manages vehicle state, and publishes real-time status updates
Implemented a command-line vehicle simulator for validating route execution and status updates with multiple simulated vehicles before integration with a real vehicle interface

ProjectsPage.title: Projects
ProjectsPage.description: Selected projects that show practical implementation, technical ownership, and the ability to build working solutions for real needs.

projects.name: Route Management System for an Autonomous Tracked Articulated Vehicle
projects.summary: A thesis full-stack software system for defining autonomous vehicle routes, forwarding route commands, and monitoring multiple simulated vehicles in real time.
description: Designed and implemented the software layer for Metropolia's KOTKA project in cooperation with the Finnish National Defence University.
Built a React and Leaflet-based map interface where users can define vehicle-specific routes, select the controlled vehicle, store routes, and monitor vehicle status.
Implemented a TypeScript Node.js WebSocket server that receives route and driving commands from the UI, targets them by vehicle identifier, and sends status updates back to the interface.
Implemented a command-line vehicle simulator that registers with the server using its own vehicle identifier and executes routes received from the server.
Validated the system with two simultaneous simulated vehicles and vehicle-specific route plans so that routes for different vehicles do not overwrite each other.
The implementation provides a scoped and extensible foundation for later connection to real vehicle data and the actual vehicle interface.

projects.name: Gamified Joint Rehabilitation, Analysis and Training (GameRAT)
projects.summary: A healthcare software project where I built web interfaces, GraphQL services, motion-data processing, and user feedback features to support physiotherapy and rehabilitation.
description: Developed a full-stack healthcare platform for designing, delivering, and analyzing physiotherapy exercises.
Built and maintained a GraphQL backend supporting communication between web applications and backend services.
Implemented React-based user interfaces for exercise planning, management, and feedback.
Contributed to browser-based visualizations as part of the broader application.
Designed and implemented a neural-network-based motion analysis system trained on 1000+ physiotherapy exercises, providing understandable feedback on exercise performance.
Implemented authentication and data protection mechanisms for handling sensitive patient-related information.

projects.name: TKIO-Finder
projects.summary: A web-based platform improving discoverability of research and innovation projects at Metropolia University of Applied Sciences through search, filtering, and matchmaking.
description: Built a full-stack platform improving discoverability of research and innovation projects at Metropolia University of Applied Sciences
Implemented search, filtering, and matchmaking features using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL
Added Google OAuth2 authentication for secure and user-friendly access
Deployed and maintained backend services in a self-hosted environment, including server-side infrastructure management
